description_long: This is a blue Adidas baseball cap made from a soft, flexible fabric, likely polyester or cotton blend, with a structured six-panel crown and a curved brim. The front of the cap prominently displays the white 'adidas' logo in bold, sans-serif letters. The crown features stitched ventilation eyelets and a fabric-covered button at the top. The back of the cap includes an adjustable plastic snapback closure in white, allowing for size customization. The interior is partially visible, showing a white sweatband lining for comfort. The overall design is sporty and casual, suitable for urban environments and outdoor activities.
description: A blue Adidas baseball cap with a curved brim, white logo on the front, and an adjustable snapback closure. The cap is made of soft fabric and features stitched eyelets and a top button.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue cap's curved brim and the prominent white 'adidas' logo on the crown.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the smooth blue fabric, top button, and partial view of the adjustable snapback closure.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the white plastic snapback closure and the interior sweatband lining.
description_view_3: Side-front view displaying the blue fabric, partial 'adidas' logo, and the curved brim's profile.
